remember: Students will be able to recall and name different types of files, file modes, and file operations.
Students will be able to list and explain the various file handling functions in Java.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of file handling, its importance, and types of files.
Students will be able to explain the differences between sequential and direct access files.
apply: Students will be able to use Java's file handling functions to create, read, write, and delete files.
Students will be able to apply file handling concepts to solve practical problems.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the efficiency of different file handling techniques and strategies.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of file handling on system performance.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of file handling and its importance in programming.
Describe the different types of files and file modes.
List and explain the various file handling functions in Java.
Explain the differences between sequential and direct access files.
Use Java's file handling functions to create, read, write, and delete files.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the concept of file handling and its importance in programming.
Describe the differences between sequential and direct access files.
Use Java's file handling functions to create, read, write, and delete files.
